global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic outdoor scene of Ashton, the lean-fit owner of a Phoenix HVAC company, squatting on his haunches next to an outdoor residential AC condenser unit on the right side of the frame, hand resting on the side of the unit, looking thoughtfully at the unit. He matches the reference image: lean fit white male in his mid-30s, short brown hair under a grey ASH trucker-style cap with a tan ASH patch, dark sunglasses, light stubble, sleeve tattoos visible on both arms, wearing a grey heather t-shirt with the small ASH logo on the left chest, dark cargo work pants. The setting is a residential side yard of a Phoenix home, tan stucco wall behind, gravel landscaping, saguaro and palo verde in middle distance. Late afternoon Phoenix sun from upper right with strong shadows and lens flare. The image has THREE text overlay elements composited as part of the final design: (1) a small narrow red horizontal sash spanning the very top edge of the frame containing the bold all-caps white text 'PHOENIX HOMEOWNERS' centered, (2) very large bold all-caps white sans-serif headline text 'BEFORE 115° HITS.' positioned in the upper portion of the frame over the sky/saguaro area on the left side where there's clean negative space, with subtle dark drop-shadow for legibility, (3) a tall solid bright red horizontal banner spanning the entire bottom edge of the frame, approximately 12% of image height, containing the bold all-caps white text 'FREE IN-HOME ESTIMATE • 602-905-1450' centered in the banner. The text overlays are rendered crisply and cleanly as part of the final designed image. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens, Ashton in sharp focus.

lighting.source: low intense Phoenix sun from upper right

composition.camera_angle: eye-level, slight 3/4 view of Ashton in profile-quarter facing the unit
composition.framing: medium, three-quarter body shot of Ashton on the right side, with negative space on the left for headline
composition.depth_of_field: shallow-medium, Ashton in sharp focus, background gently blurred
composition.focal_point: Ashton's face and the headline 'BEFORE 115° HITS.' on the left side
